# Paperas - Peer-Reviewed Academic Journal

> Paperas is an open access academic publishing platform by Research Verse Journal And Publication House Of India. We publish peer-reviewed research papers, scholarly articles, and academic publications across various disciplines.

## About
Paperas provides a platform for dissemination of original research findings across multiple disciplines, fostering intellectual discourse and promoting evidence-based research.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://paperas.dev
- Research Archive: https://paperas.dev/research
- Journal Archives: https://paperas.dev/journal
- About: https://paperas.dev/about/aim-scope
- Author Guidelines: https://paperas.dev/about/author-guidelines
- Contact: https://paperas.dev/contact

## API
- Search papers: https://paperas.dev/search/advanced?q={query}

## Policies
- Open Access: All published papers are freely accessible
- Peer Review: Double-blind peer review process
- Publication Ethics: https://paperas.dev/about/publication-ethics
